description: A configured provider instance for a Communication Channel (ADR 043): Twilio-US, a Telegram bot, the site's Frappe email stack... Channel is the semantic ('SMS'); the account is who actually carries it, with its own region scope and hourly rate limit.

fields.description: Adapter key resolved through the communication_channel_providers hook. Built-ins: frappe-email (Frappe Email Account stack), in-app (portal inbox).
fields.label: Provider

fields.description: Routing scope: persons from this country prefer this account. Blank = default account for the channel.
fields.label: Country / Region

fields.description: Maximum sends per trailing hour through this account (free-tier throttle). 0 = unlimited. Emergency-category messages bypass the throttle.
fields.label: Hourly Limit

fields.description: Provider-specific configuration as JSON (API keys, sender ids, webhook secrets). Passed verbatim to the adapter.
fields.label: Settings (JSON)

name: Channel Provider Account
